'''sadulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swad|swad]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swad|swad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sadulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sædilith|sædilith]] || [[word:sædilij|sædilij]] || [[word:sædilish|sædilish]] || [[word:sædili|sædili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:saduduluth|saduduluth]] || [[word:saduduluj|saduduluj]] || [[word:sadudulush|sadudulush]] || [[word:sadudulu|sadudulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:saduluth|saduluth]] || [[word:saduluj|saduluj]] || [[word:sadulush|sadulush]] || [[word:sadulu|sadulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadufluth|sadufluth]] || [[word:sadufluj|sadufluj]] || [[word:saduflush|saduflush]] || [[word:sadufluf|sadufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:saduluthu|saduluthu]] || [[word:saduluju|saduluju]] || [[word:sadulushu|sadulushu]] || [[word:saduluku|saduluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:saduluth|saduluth]] || [[word:saduluj|saduluj]] || [[word:sadulush|sadulush]] || [[word:sadulu|sadulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:saduluthul|saduluthul]] || [[word:sadulujul|sadulujul]] || [[word:sadulushul|sadulushul]] || [[word:sadulukul|sadulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:saduluthuthu|saduluthuthu]] || [[word:sadulujuju|sadulujuju]] || [[word:sadulushushu|sadulushushu]] || [[word:saduluku|saduluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:saduluthun|saduluthun]] || [[word:sadulujun|sadulujun]] || [[word:sadulushun|sadulushun]] || [[word:sadulukun|sadulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:saduluthuoro|saduluthuoro]] || [[word:sadulujuoro|sadulujuoro]] || [[word:sadulushuoro|sadulushuoro]] || [[word:sadulukuoro|sadulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
